_metadata.name: Cloud Security Posture Audit
_metadata.description: Comprehensive cloud security audit that checks IAM policies, reviews S3 bucket configurations, scans for secret leaks with TruffleHog, and aggregates all findings into a unified security posture report. Use for periodic security reviews or pre-deployment checks.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Cloud Security Posture Audit
manifest.description: Audit IAM policies, S3 buckets, and leaked secrets, then generate a unified posture report.
manifest.author: sentris-team

data.description: Trigger the cloud security posture audit
Load AWS credentials for API access
Query AWS IAM to review user policies, roles, and identify overly permissive access
List S3 buckets and check for public access, encryption, and logging
Run TruffleHog to detect leaked secrets, API keys, and credentials in repositories
Combine all audit findings into a unified security posture score

config.script: const iam = input.iamAudit || {}; const s3 = input.s3Audit || {}; const secrets = input.secretScan || {}; const iamIssues = iam.overpermissive || 0; const s3Issues = (s3.publicBuckets || 0) + (s3.unencrypted || 0); const secretLeaks = secrets.verified || 0; const totalIssues = iamIssues + s3Issues + secretLeaks; const postureScore = Math.max(0, 100 - totalIssues * 5); return { postureScore, summary: { iam: { issues: iamIssues }, s3: { issues: s3Issues }, secrets: { leaks: secretLeaks } }, totalIssues, grade: postureScore >= 90 ? 'A' : postureScore >= 75 ? 'B' : postureScore >= 60 ? 'C' : postureScore >= 40 ? 'D' : 'F' };

data.description: Deliver the security posture report to the security team

config.message: Cloud Security Posture: Grade {{script_aggregate.output.grade}} ({{script_aggregate.output.postureScore}}%) — {{script_aggregate.output.totalIssues}} issues found

requiredSecrets.name: aws_access_key_id
requiredSecrets.description: AWS access key ID for the target account

requiredSecrets.name: aws_secret_access_key
requiredSecrets.description: AWS secret access key for the target account

requiredSecrets.name: slack_webhook_url
requiredSecrets.description: Slack webhook URL for posture report delivery
